measurement_note: Measures market value of final goods and services produced within a territory.
warning: Does not measure distribution unpaid care ecological depletion or well-being directly.

measurement_note: Measures income or wealth inequality on a 0 to 1 scale.
warning: Can hide distributional details at top and bottom.

measurement_note: Share of population below a defined poverty threshold.
warning: Depends on poverty line definition and cost-of-living context.
Does not measure job quality wages security or care burdens.

measurement_note: Share of income accruing to labor rather than capital.
warning: Sensitive to measurement definitions and self-employment treatment.

measurement_note: Government investment in infrastructure public systems and productive capacity.
warning: Quality and distribution matter as much as quantity.

measurement_note: Debt service relative to income revenue or exports.
warning: Does not alone capture maturity currency exposure or social cost.
Data often uncertain and may obscure distribution.

measurement_note: Emissions per unit of output energy or activity.
warning: Efficiency gains may coexist with total emissions growth.

measurement_note: Composite indicator of quality of life social outcomes and subjective well-being.
